---
title: 'The Power  eats you when used selfishly. But empow...'
date: '2015-07-20T06:59:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '138753373453716144'
blogger_filename: '/2015/07/the-power-eats-you-when-used-selfishly.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

The Power eats you when used selfishly. But empowers you when used for others.
